prompt: create a image of software UI about floating circular waveform that morphs as user speaks, soft glowing particles, dark blurred background, subtle microphone icon
prompt_refined: Generate a modern software user interface (UI) featuring a prominent, centrally floating, dynamic, and organically morphing circular audio waveform. Soft, glowing particles are subtly scattered around the waveform. The background is dark and gently blurred. A subtle, minimalist microphone icon is positioned at the bottom-center of the UI.
objects: Prominent, centrally floating, dynamic, organically morphing circular audio waveform
Soft, glowing particles subtly scattered around the waveform
Subtle, minimalist microphone icon at the bottom-center of the UI
